name: Apple Developer APIs
what_it_does: Collection of Apple developer APIs including App Store Connect API, Apple Push Notification Service (APNs), Sign in with Apple, and StoreKit for iOS/macOS app management.
use_cases: Sending push notifications to iOS/macOS devices via APNs for agent-triggered mobile notifications
Managing App Store listings, builds, and metadata via App Store Connect API in CI/CD agents
Implementing Sign in with Apple OAuth flow for user authentication in agent-backed apps
Processing in-app purchase receipt validation for subscription management agents
Querying App Store analytics and sales data via App Store Connect API for reporting agents
not_for: Non-Apple platform development — these APIs only work for Apple ecosystem
Teams without Apple Developer Program membership ($99/year required)
best_when: Building iOS/macOS applications that need push notifications, App Store management, or Apple authentication in agent workflows.
avoid_when: You're not publishing on Apple platforms — the Apple Developer Program cost and certificate complexity isn't justified.

auth.notes: APNs: certificate-based or token-based auth (.p8 key + JWT). App Store Connect API: JWT signed with .p8 private key. Sign in with Apple: OAuth2 client_secret is JWT derived from .p8 key.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; requires Apple Developer Program
pricing.paid_tiers: Apple Developer Program: $99/year; APIs are included with membership
pricing.notes: APIs are included with $99/year Apple Developer Program membership. No per-API-call costs for APNs or App Store Connect.

performance.rate_limits: App Store Connect: 3600 requests/hour; APNs: no published limit

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: App Store Connect returns JSON API errors; APNs returns APNS-specific reason codes in response headers
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: APNs apns-id header can track unique notifications; Store Connect has no idempotency
known_agent_gotchas: APNs certificates expire annually and must be renewed manually — automatic renewal not supported; set alerts before expiry
JWT tokens for App Store Connect expire after 20 minutes — implement token refresh logic in agent before each batch of requests
APNs device tokens change after reinstall or OS update — handle Unregistered APNs response by removing stale tokens
App Store Connect API uses JSON:API spec with specific include/filter query params — pagination requires following next page links
Sign in with Apple requires domain verification of your server's return URL — mismatched redirect_uri causes silent OAuth failure

security_score_components.security_notes: P8 private keys must be stored securely — Apple cannot regenerate them; only download once at creation. Certificate-based auth is being deprecated in favor of token auth.
